summary: Completed comprehensive testing of trifold brochure content rewrite. All major content changes successfully implemented according to requirements. Fixed minor spacing issue in Panel 1 subtitle.
passed_tests: Brochure page loads at /brochure.html with updated content
Page 1 Panel 5: Shows correct 'Что мы лечим' heading (updated from 'Восстановление ресурса')
Page 1 Panel 5: Contains required treatments - 'Бесплодие', 'ДЦП у детей', 'Позвоночник и суставы'
Page 1 Panel 1: Subtitle correctly updated to 'Традиционная китайская медицина. Остров Хайнань, Санья.'
Page 2 Panel 2: Shows correct 'Почему Китай' heading (updated from 'За гранью симптомов')
Page 2 Panel 2: Text does NOT contain prohibited words 'протокол', 'деструктивных', 'биомеханическую'
Page 2 Panel 3: Shows correct 'Руки профессора' heading (updated from 'Системная диагностика')
Page 2 Panel 3: Contains mention of 'пальпация' as required
Page 2 Panel 4: Shows correct 'Иглонож' heading (updated from 'Микрохирургия без скальпеля')
Page 2 Panel 4: Mentions correct measurements '0,4–1,2 мм' and time frame '48 часов'
Page 2 Panel 4: Spine image correctly removed (now text-only panel)
Panel 6 contacts: Contains correct phone number '+86 198 7270 7491' with 'по вопросам сотрудничества'
QR code correctly points to price list with proper caption
Price page at /price loads successfully with exactly 20 procedures
Price table contains key procedures: acupuncture, needle-knife, massage with CNY prices
All required images load correctly: desk.jpg, doctors.jpg, needles.jpg, qrcode-price.png
Landing page with preview iframes works correctly
